name: dev-cycle
description: Run {{project.name}}'s {{ticketing.itemNoun}} development cycle with project subagents. Use when the user requests /dev-cycle, implementation/review/QA processing of workflow-state {{ticketing.itemNoun}}s, or the automated {{ticketing.itemNoun}}-to-PR workflow.

interface.short_description: Run {{ticketing.itemNoun}} implementation, review, and QA handoffs
interface.default_prompt: Use $dev-cycle to process ready {{project.name}} {{ticketing.itemNoun}}s through implementation, review, QA, and PR handoff.
